points.goal: Identify Leo Carrow's post-subpoena phone remote-erasure as a preservation failure with lost source status, MD-09 and MD-15 impacts, and a disclosure or forensic action.
Identify the responsive MD-09 dealer safety escalation miscoded nonresponsive and not produced, including the QC reference and recode-and-produce action.
Calculate the MD-11 privilege-log gap as 1350 unlogged withheld documents from 2260 withheld and 910 logged, and classify the protocol status as noncompliant.
Identify the uncollected board portal as a collection gap affecting MD-07, MD-08, and MD-09 with a collect-source action.
Provide the correct non-complete category statuses and source references for MD-07, MD-08, MD-09, MD-11, and MD-15.
Provide the correct rollup metrics and mark the rolling production as not ready.
Provide the required prioritized remediation action set with correct action types, owners, targets, category impacts, and unique priority ranks.
